task_completion.description: Verify that a new Work Package Status named 'On Hold' has been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the OpenProject Administration -> Work package statuses screen, a status named 'On Hold' is visible in the list of statuses.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Developer' role exists or was created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Administration -> Roles and permissions screen, or selected in the Workflow configuration role dropdown, the role 'Developer' is visible.

task_completion.description: Verify that the workflow is configured to allow the 'Developer' role to transition 'Bug' types from 'New' and 'In progress' to 'On Hold'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Administration -> Workflows edit screen, with Role 'Developer' and Type 'Bug' selected, the matrix shows checkboxes ticked for transitioning from 'New' to 'On Hold' and from 'In progress' to 'On Hold'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the specific bug in the 'E-Commerce Platform' project has been updated to 'On Hold'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the work package details or list view for the 'E-Commerce Platform' project, the work package titled 'Fix broken checkout on mobile Safari' displays its status as 'On Hold'.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent interacted with the OpenProject web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the web browser navigating the OpenProject UI, clicking buttons, and filling out forms, rather than using terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify that the workflow matrix was genuinely configured in the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the actual workflow matrix page with checkboxes being clicked and saved, not a text editor or developer tools modifying the page.

integrity.description: Verify that the work package status was updated via the application UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the work package status dropdown being used to select 'On Hold' and the change being applied in the OpenProject interface.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target project: 'ecommerce-platform'. Target WP subject: 'Fix broken checkout on mobile Safari'. New status name: 'On Hold'. Target role: 'Developer'. Target type: 'Bug'. The 'Developer' role may need to be created by the agent if it does not exist by default.
